name: recoil_app_engine_init
description: RecoilApp::EngineInit initializes core engine subsystems, configures input/video time state, and reports subsystem status.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /DUINT_PTR=UINT /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?EngineInit@RecoilApp@@QAEHI@Z at 0x442a50 still fails: 171 unmasked mismatches, 200 relocation bytes masked, 11 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 354 bytes, VC object symbol size 384 bytes.

Reviewed difference is broad source-shape drift in the subsystem status print sequence: original selects PASSED/FAILED strings directly and calls printf through a reused imported function pointer, while current source selects the same strings through inline status helpers and emits direct printf calls. The native smokes cover the accepted direct subsystem callees and leaf side effects rather than calling the full live engine bootstrap.
